Footer.tagline: Public financial management advisory for Ministries of Finance and the donors who fund them.

MobileBanner.headline: Best viewed on desktop
MobileBanner.subline: Some features work better on a larger screen

Hero.lead: Gregg Pavitt has led PFM reform for Ministries of Finance across 15 countries — designing the systems, building the capacity, and delivering the assessments donors rely on. The same field-tested IPSAS expertise is now available as a self-serve Drill kit or authoritative live Desk reference.

twoWays.eyebrow: Two ways to work with us
twoWays.headline: Senior PFM expertise on the ground, or in your daily workflow.
twoWays.consultBody: For ministries and donors needing senior PFM expertise on the ground — embedded advisory, system design, capacity building, and the assessments donors rely on.
twoWays.toolkitBody: For teams who need IPSAS Drills and IPSAS Desk in their daily work, at a fraction of consulting cost. Self-serve, 14-day free trial, no card to look around.

Bio.headline: Reliable delivery in the toughest PFM environments.
Bio.tagline: PFM Specialist · 25+ Years · Pacific, Africa, Asia
Bio.paragraph1: Gregg Pavitt is a public financial management specialist with over 25 years of experience helping governments in Sub-Saharan Africa, South Asia, and the Pacific strengthen how they plan, allocate, and account for public resources.
Bio.paragraph2: He provides technical assistance and advisory services in six core areas: PFM studies and assessments, public expenditure management (PEM), domestic revenue mobilisation (DRM), integrated financial management systems (IFMIS), public investment management (PIM), and International Public Sector Accounting Standards (IPSAS).
Bio.paragraph3: Gregg has served as Team Leader and Key Expert on programmes funded by the EU (EuropeAid), World Bank, DFAT, USAID, and DFID/FCDO — both in long-term embedded roles within Ministries of Finance and on targeted short-term assignments. He is known for effective policy dialogue with government counterparts, practical reform design, and building national capacity that outlasts the project cycle.
Bio.paragraph4: International consulting firms and development organisations engage Gregg for his ability to mobilise quickly, manage multi-disciplinary teams, and deliver reliably within the compliance and reporting frameworks that donor-funded programmes demand.
Bio.quote: “Gregg was the consummate professional consultant on my team…His advice was measured, clearly expressed and possessed both longer-term strategic vision for what could be possible and the short-term operational steps to be implemented immediately.”

Expertise.headline: Six reform tracks, one integrated practice.

pfm-studies.label: PFM Studies
pfm-studies.description: Conducting diagnostic assessments (PEFA, fiduciary reviews) and research to inform PFM reform strategies.

ifms.label: IFMS
ifms.description: Advising on the design, implementation, and improvement of government financial information systems.

ipsas.label: IPSAS
ipsas.description: Supporting governments transitioning to accrual-basis accounting and IPSAS-compliant financial reporting.

pim.label: PIM
pim.description: Strengthening systems for planning, prioritizing, and executing public investment programs to maximize development outcomes.

pem.label: PEM
pem.description: Supporting budget formulation, execution, and reporting reforms to improve fiscal discipline and service delivery.

drm.label: DRM
drm.description: Helping governments increase domestic revenue through tax policy, administration reform, and compliance improvement.

Regions.headline: Fifteen countries, three regions, one playbook.

Donors.headline: Trusted by the agencies funding the world’s hardest PFM reforms.

fsm.title: Creating and Deploying IPSAS based Reporting System
fsm.desc: Developing custom IPSAS reporting system. Modifying secondary chart of accounts, automating power pivot production system for multi-year reporting of governmental, donor, and special purpose funds.

eu-drm.title: PFM Diagnostic Studies
eu-drm.desc: Delivered tax reform analysis, fiscal transparency assessments, and local revenue modeling across Mozambique and Malawi — including PEFA reviews, VAT and corporate tax reform, property tax restructuring, and subnational fiscal decentralization for the Millennium Challenge Corporation.

ifmis.title: IFMIS design and operationalisation
ifmis.desc: Design and procure a resilient IFMIS to modernize public financial management, ensure GAAP compliance, and maximize transparency across island operations. Coordinated for individual island states and national government.

Toolkit.headline: The same systems Gregg uses — available to your team.
Toolkit.lead: Purpose-built software for IPSAS queries, staff training, and reform diagnostics. Available to Ministry of Finance practitioners on request.

deskCard.title: Sourced IPSAS answers, paragraph-cited
deskCard.body: Ask any IPSAS question in plain English. Get a sourced answer with the exact paragraph citation, written so it can go straight into your working papers.

drillsCard.title: Build the reflexes. Close the books faster.
drillsCard.body: Short, focused practice questions tuned to the situations your team will actually face — opening balances, donor grants under IPSAS 23, GFS mapping. Built from current implementation work.

Contact.headline: Planning a PFM engagement?
Contact.lead: Short-term diagnostics, long-term embedded roles, or a second opinion on a reform design — send a brief and Gregg will reply within two working days.

facts.areasValue: PFM Studies · IFMS · IPSAS · PIM · PEM · DRM
